name: DowngradePackage
description: Existing customer wants to reduce their package by removing specific products, dropping to a lower tier, or moving to a smaller bundle — they want to keep their Virgin Media account but with fewer or lower-spec services. This is not a full cancellation, a general price complaint, or a request for a better deal on the same services.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to downgrade my {productType}
Can I remove {productType} from my package?
Downgrade my package to just broadband
I'd like to drop {productType} from my bundle
How do I reduce my package?
Take {productType} off my account please
I don't use my {productType} anymore and want it removed
Can I go down to a smaller package?
I want to keep broadband but get rid of {productType}
Remove {productType} and {productType2} from my current plan
I only need broadband — can you take everything else off?
My package has things I don't need — I want to slim it down
How do I drop down to a lower tier on my {productType} ?
I want fewer channels — can I move to a basic {productType} package?
Get rid of {productType} on my account
I no longer need {productType} as part of my bundle
Can I switch from the {productType} to just broadband and phone?
I'd like to reduce what I'm paying by removing some services
Do I have to keep {productType} or can I take it off?
Strip my package back to the basics
I'm not watching {productType} so there's no point paying for it
downgrade my package
